channel.title: pages on Fredrik K. Gustafsson | Postdoc in Oxford | Machine Learning for Healthcare
channel.description: Recent content in pages on Fredrik K. Gustafsson | Postdoc in Oxford | Machine Learning for Healthcare

item.title: Feedback
item.description: Please feel free to leave any type of anonymous feedback on my presentation at the following link: https://forms.gle/pfkhxdRzEE7ETmcs8

item.title: News
item.description: [Mar 24, 2026] New preprints: Semantic Self-Distillation for Language Model Uncertainty [arXiv] [project] and Entropy Alone is Insufficient for Safe Selective Prediction in LLMs [arXiv] [project], work led by Edward Phillips. [Mar 11, 2026] New preprint: SignalMC-MED: A Multimodal Benchmark for Evaluating Biosignal Foundation Models on Single-Lead ECG and PPG [arXiv] [code] [project]. [Jan 18, 2026] New blog post: My Year of Reading in 2025. [Jan 8, 2026] New preprint: Scanner-Induced Domain Shifts Undermine the Robustness of Pathology Foundation Models [arXiv] [project], work led together with Erik Thiringer.
